title: Fish and game, conservation; enforcement of laws relating to
doc_html:
§1380.  Fish and game, conservation; enforcement of laws relating to

The members of the division shall co-operate with game wardens and shall enforce the fish and game laws of the state and the laws enacted for the protection and conservation of forests, woods, and other natural resources.
doc_text:
§1380.  Fish and game, conservation; enforcement of laws relating to
The members of the division shall co-operate with game wardens and shall enforce the fish and game laws of the state and the laws enacted for the protection and conservation of forests, woods, and other natural resources.
